mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_NO , M.MEMBER_NAME , R.RATING , R.REVIEW_TITLE , R.REVIEW_CONTENT , R.CREATE_DATE , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW_LIKE WHERE REVIEW_NO = R.REVIEW_NO ) AS LIKE_COUNT , CASE WHEN #{memberNo} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLANT_REVIEW_LIKE WHERE REVIEW_NO = R.REVIEW_NO AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_LIKED FROM PLANT_REVIEW R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RATING , ROUND(AVG(RATING)) AS AVERAGE_RATING , SUM(CASE WHEN RATING IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ONE , SUM(CASE WHEN RATING IN (3,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TWO , SUM(CASE WHEN RATING IN (5,6) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THREE , SUM(CASE WHEN RATING IN (7,8) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FOUR , SUM(CASE WHEN RATING IN (9,10) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FIVE FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLANT_REVIEW SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PLANT_REVIEW_LIKE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT REVIEW_NO FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW_LIKE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
